DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by managing server load.

DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the player join limit for testing on 64-bit Windows.
DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64_Staged.purpose: Helps developers optimize game performance before full release.

FFlagRenderEditableMeshDecals.mechanism: Allows decals to be applied to editable mesh objects.
FFlagRenderEditableMeshDecals.purpose: Gives players more customization options for their creations.

DFFlagLargeSenderMultipleStateTransition.mechanism: Enables multiple state changes in one update for large data senders.
DFFlagLargeSenderMultipleStateTransition.purpose: Improves performance and responsiveness in games with complex interactions.

DFFlagDirectFieldSet.mechanism: Allows direct setting of fields in data structures without needing intermediate steps.
DFFlagDirectFieldSet.purpose: Improves performance and efficiency when updating game data, leading to smoother gameplay.

FStringTextureTranscodeNewFidelityETC_St.mechanism: Enhances the way textures are converted and compressed for better visual quality.
FStringTextureTranscodeNewFidelityETC_St.purpose: Provides players with higher quality graphics and textures in games, making them look more appealing.
